display_text: Sister's Shroud, Tier N/A (Non-Purchasable): Provides the Veiled passive, granting 150% evasion for 5 seconds when dropping below 50% HP. Each successful dodge while Veiled is active reduces the evasion bonus by 75% of its current value. The Last Caress passive ensures this effect's cooldown only resets upon the wearer's death or an enemy hero kill, making it a rare defensive option. Stats: Evasion: 150%, Duration: 5s, HP Threshold: 50%.
search_text: sisters shroud, veil passive, low hp evasion, survival item, emergency evasion, percent hp trigger, dodge mechanic, evasion decay, death reset, kill reset, limited proc, defensive neutral, Shroud
